regional_cost_note: Plumbers in Palmerston North typically charge $90–$130/hr plus GST. Call-out fees add $60–$100. Emergency after-hours rates are $150–$220/hr.

businesses.name: Foleys Palmerston North
businesses.known_for: Full-service plumbing, gasfitting and drainlaying with 24/7 emergency callout — part of a 12-location national network.

businesses.name: Fast Flow Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Prompt residential plumbing and gas fitting at competitive rates, with a track record of completing urgent jobs on weekends.

businesses.name: Uneeda Plumber
businesses.known_for: Master Plumbers established in 2004, covering residential and commercial plumbing and gasfitting across the Manawatū region.

businesses.name: Refined Plumbing and Gasfitting Services
businesses.known_for: Owner-operated by Mike, highly praised for honesty, transparency and quality workmanship in plumbing, spouting and gasfitting.

businesses.name: Semtex Plumbing, Drainage & Gas
businesses.known_for: Established in 1995, specialising in plumbing, gasfitting, pipe relining and 24/7 emergency service for residential, commercial and industrial clients.

businesses.name: Preferred Plumbing Specialists
businesses.known_for: Co-owned by two licensed plumbers with 15+ years experience in residential and commercial plumbing, gas fitting and drain laying.

businesses.name: McDonald Plumbing & Gas
businesses.known_for: Locally owned small business known for fast same-day service covering plumbing, gasfitting and drainlaying across Manawatu.

businesses.name: Tap Plumbing Solutions
businesses.known_for: 40+ years combined experience delivering plumbing, gas and heating services across residential, commercial and industrial properties.

businesses.name: Brokenshire Plumbing & Electrical
businesses.known_for: Established in 1993 with a team of 11, specialising in residential plumbing, drainlaying and combined electrical work.
